title: Helicoid Spiral + Torus Knot (Math Grammar)
purpose: Render two parametric surfaces — a helicoid spiral and a (2,3) torus knot — with distinct blue and orange emissive materials to demonstrate combined-OBJ multi-group assignment.
prompt: Visualise a helicoid spiral surface and a torus knot.
preview_note: preview.png is a lightweight reference raster; octane-preview.png is the REAL native Octane render (standard tier).
quality_checklist: Preview is non-blank and the subject is recognizable at thumbnail size.
scene.obj imports the local path listed in commands[].
Camera frames the full subject with margin.
Each usemtl group has an explicit create_material + assign_material(group_index).
known_pitfalls: Octane caches imported geometry by filename; re-rendering the same mesh name does NOT reload the OBJ. The bridge now deletes the stale mesh node before re-import to force a fresh load.
Named materials persist across renders; create_material is a no-op if the name already exists, so re-renders must use fresh material names or the stale (washed-out) material is reused.
The persistent bridge may not stay alive on some Octane X builds (closes after showWindow); render via the one-shot bridge drain. When alive, it processes the queue too.

RENDER TARGET auto-activates (REFUTED 2026-07-10): the current persistent bridge calls activate_render_target() and the live log shows 'activated render target Hermes Render Target (NT_RENDERTARGET)' before save_preview. Manual RT clicking is NOT required. The real blank-frame cause observed 2026-07-10: a STALE in-memory bridge. Octane name-caches the Lua script, so merely re-clicking it in the Scripts menu re-runs the cached OLD code (which predates create_node). The bridge then fails every scene-build command with 'attempt to call a nil value (global 'create_node')' and only save_preview runs -> empty white frame. FIX: fully RESTART Octane X (kills the cached Lua), then re-open the persistent bridge once so it recompiles the current on-disk script. Verify reload took by checking the bridge.log for a fresh 'persistent bridge starting' AND that scene commands no longer error on create_node.

required_evidence: final native Octane render bundled as octane-preview.png

status: built; octane-preview.png FAILED pixel-QA (2026-07-12) — near-uniform flat field, no visible subject; needs fresh live render
